text: The air holds a charged stillness, the kind born of anticipation and possibility. Entering the R+D space, I am surrounded by the spirit of innovation—walls splashed with color and words, glowing screens echoing silent thoughts. Here, ideas seem to linger in the very light, inviting me to pause, ponder, and perhaps create. There’s comfort in this structured quiet; yet the urge to stretch beyond the glass into the unknown hums inside me.
